services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Safe removal of unwanted or hazardous trees. Full cleanup included with every job.

services.title: Brush Clearing
services.description: Clear overgrown brush and vegetation. Perfect for property maintenance and landscaping prep.

services.title: Stump Removal
services.description: Complete stump grinding and removal. No trace left behind.

services.title: Yard Waste Cleanup
services.description: Hauling and disposal of brush piles and yard debris. Quick turnaround available.

about.heading: Real tree service, real prices
about.body: We're a York team that answers the phone and shows up when promised. One call gets your trees and brush handled right.

reviews.name: Nate R.
reviews.text: Very professional and detailed work. Made my tree look great and best of all, affordable pricing!

reviews.name: Adrian V.
reviews.text: Top notch service and cleanup at competitive prices. Will go above and beyond to take care of you.

reviews.name: Ed L.
reviews.text: Available next day to clear out brush pile. Fantastic job at very reasonable price. Will call again.

cta.heading: Ready to clear that yard?
cta.body: Quick quotes, fair pricing, and we show up when we say we will. Call today for same-day service availability.
